    AnnotatedHandler

    Annotation for handling business connection events in a declarative manner.
    BusinessMessageHandler
    Annotation for handling business message events in a declarative manner.
    CallbackHandler
    Annotation for handling incoming callback queries in a declarative manner.
    ChannelPostHandler
    Annotation for handling incoming channel posts in a declarative manner.
    ChatBoostHandler
    Annotation for handling chat boost events in a declarative manner.
    ChatJoinRequestHandler
    Annotation for handling chat join request events in a declarative manner.
    ChatMemberHandler
    Annotation for handling chat member status updates in a declarative manner.
    ChosenInlineHandler
    Annotation for handling chosen inline result events in a declarative manner.
    DeletedBusinessMessageHandler
    Annotation for handling deleted business message events in a declarative manner.
    EditedBusinessMessageHandler
    Annotation for handling edited business message events in a declarative manner.
    EditedChannelPostHandler
    Annotation for handling edited channel post events in a declarative manner.
    EditedMessageHandler
    Annotation for handling edited message events in a declarative manner.
    InlineHandler
    Annotation for handling inline query events in a declarative manner.
    MessageHandler
    Annotation for handling incoming messages in a declarative manner.
    MyChatMemberHandler
    Annotation for handling the bot's own chat member status updates in a declarative manner.
    PollAnswerHandler
    Annotation for handling poll answer events in a declarative manner.
    PollHandler
    Annotation for handling poll state update events in a declarative manner.
    PreCheckoutHandler
    Annotation for handling pre-checkout query events in a declarative manner.
    PurchasedPaidMediaHandler
    Annotation for handling purchased paid media events in a declarative manner.
    ReactionCountHandler
    Annotation for handling reaction count update events in a declarative manner.
    ReactionHandler
    Annotation for handling message reaction events in a declarative manner.
    RemovedChatBoostHandler
    Annotation for handling removed chat boost events in a declarative manner.
    ShippingHandler
    Annotation for handling shipping query events in a declarative manner.
